description:
Eiyu, Shio, Akari, and Runako go to the beach. Eiyu and Akari get left behind and spend the night together.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Natsu no Umi de mo Mite Kurenakute mo Hitoban Akashite mo Lovecome ni Naranai
Summer Beach? Looking Away? Spent the Night? Still Won`t Start a Rom-Com
夏の海でも見てくれなくても一晩明かしてもラブコメにならない
